title: Bad potato mod
description:
A VERY bad potato mod made in mcreator it 2 hours
adds potato wood and potato block
body:
## REQUIERMENTS:
[fabric-api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

## ABOUT
This mod adds potatos. Made in mcreator in 2 hours.
The features that it adds are:
- potato wood set
- energized potato
- potato block

  Thats it.
